scope_boundary: Bounded local residual-ledger storage/replay fixture only. The fixture computes an append-only digest chain over four public-safe residual events and rejects five expected-invalid controls for handoff owner mismatch, missing discharge receipt or review, sequence gaps, missing workload context, and support promotion from replay shape. It is not a deployed residual ledger. It does not run a deployed residual ledger, observe live residuals, prove all residuals are observable, prove safety, measure model quality, or promote the Compact Generative Systems chapter core claim.
transition_reason: The storage/replay fixture is useful because it moves residual honesty from field-presence and cross-artifact visibility into bounded replay behavior: residuals must keep sequence continuity, owner handoff, discharge review, workload context, and non-claim boundaries. It remains a local deterministic fixture, not live or externally reviewable residual-ledger evidence, so it blocks promotion for deployed storage, live residual detection, safety, model quality, benchmark performance, or chapter-core support.
required_artifacts: live or externally reviewable residual-ledger storage replay
public-safe workload trace with residual creation, handoff, discharge, and residual survival under replay
independent review of owner handoff and discharge criteria
tamper or adversarial replay evidence beyond deterministic local fixtures
accepted evidence-transition record for any narrowed upward support movement
negative_results: discharge without receipt or review is rejected
support promotion from replay shape is rejected
no chapter core claim is promoted
downgrade_triggers: support-state promotion accepted from replay shape
fixture described as a deployed residual ledger or live residual detector
promotion_burden: Move above argument only for a narrowed residual-ledger storage/replay claim after live or externally reviewable residual-ledger replay, public-safe workload context, owner handoff records, discharge review records, adversarial or tamper replay behavior, independent review, residuals, and non-claims are recorded with a separate accepted transition.
limitations: no proof that every residual is observable
does not promote any chapter core claim
reviewer_independence: local maintainer-agent review only; not an independent residual-ledger, workflow, safety, verifier-quality, source-interpretation, or external audit
acceptance_blockers: no live or externally reviewable residual-ledger storage replay
no public-safe workload trace from a deployed residual ledger
no independent owner-handoff or discharge review
no adversarial replay beyond deterministic local controls
non_claims: does not promote residual honesty above argument
does not prove deployed residual-ledger storage, live residual detection, safety, model quality, benchmark performance, deployment safety, or ASI
does not create an upward support-state transition
does not promote any chapter core claim
does not promote the Compact Generative Systems chapter core claim
